channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260318)
item.description:
What's New

fix: auto-detect broken cursor tracking in terminal emulators

  • Add cursorTrackingBroken flag to detect clients that don't properly

report cursor position through IMKit API (e.g., Warp, iTerm2)

  • Auto-detect after setMarkedText: if selectedRange().location doesn't

match expected position, disable cursor movement detection for client

  • Reset detection flag on app switch via bundle ID tracking
  • Skip cursor movement detection for broken-tracking clients to prevent

engine reset during Vietnamese composition

  • Bump build number to 20260318

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
